chunks.text: Technical Reports - Umesh Vazirani. On Quantum Search, Experts and Geometry (EECS-2013-186) Milosh Drezgich.
chunks.question: What is the title of the technical report by Milosh Drezgich?
chunks.answer: On Quantum Search, Experts and Geometry.

chunks.text: Simple and Efficient Leader Election in the Full Information Model (CSD-94-800) Rafail Ostrovsky, Sridhar Rajagopalan and Umesh Vazirani.
chunks.question: Who are the authors of the leader election report?
chunks.answer: Rafail Ostrovsky, Sridhar Rajagopalan, Umesh Vazirani.

chunks.text: An Optimal Algorithm for On-Line Bipartite Matching (M91/18) Richard M. Karp, Umesh Vazirani and V.V. Vazirani.
chunks.question: What algorithm is described in report M91/18?
chunks.answer: An Optimal Algorithm for On-Line Bipartite Matching.
